title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
